title: Documentation drift in architecture docs
explain: ARCHITECTURE.md should list both workouts and users in its Features section so docs match the current repository structure.

title: Missing changelog entry for users feature
explain: CHANGELOG.md should include a users feature note so recent changes are traceable.

title: Checklist drift: apply step is missing
explain: The checklist must include Apply to complete the verify → plan → apply remediation loop.

title: Structural inconsistency in workout type naming
explain: Workout services use WorkoutPlan as the canonical exported domain type. Consistent type naming keeps feature contracts predictable.

title: Missing expected notes artifact marker
explain: PLAYBOOK_NOTES.md should include a Last Verified marker so maintenance state is explicit.
